mail-change.text-1: Either you or someone else has requested to change the e-mail address for your account with IQ Option.
mail-change.text-2: To change the e-mail address, click below
mail-change.grey: If you don't want to change your e-mail address or didn't request this, just ignore and delete this message.

with-request.text-1: We’ve received your withdrawal request for
with-request.black: Should you have any questions about this transaction, please refer us to its unique identifier:
with-request.note: How soon will I receive my withdrawal?
with-request.note-text: We aim to process all withdrawal requests within 24 working hours. Please keep in mind that the payment service provider may require more time to complete the process depending on the payment method.
with-request.thanks: Thank you for choosing IQ Option as your trusted broker!

not-active.text-1: This e-mail is to remind you that your trading account with IQ Option has not been active for
not-active.text-2: and may soon become subject to an Dormant Account service fee.
not-active.terms: , in case no operations are performed on a trading account in the span of 90 (Ninety) calendar days, the account shall be considered Dormant and the Company is entitled to apply a monthly service fee of 50 Euro
not-active.terms-strong: to the remaining balance of the Client’s account.
not-active.note-text: The fee shall NOT exceed the total remaining balance of the Client’s Account. We will NOT charge your credit card or any other payment medium you’ve used, the amount will only be deduced from your IQ Option trading balance.
not-active.avoid: You still have time to avoid the Service Fee
not-active.continue: If you wish to continue doing business with us, simply place a deal on the IQ Option platform to restore your account back to Active status.
not-active.not-interested: If you wish to continue doing business with us, simply place a deal on the IQ Option platform to restore your account back to Active status.
